{
  "decision": "fail",

  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],

  "findings": [
    "Inadequate ventilation clearance around installed transformer violates NEC Art. 450 spacing requirements",
    "Transformer installed in non-compliant location without required clearance for heat dissipation and maintenance access",
    "Dry-type or pad-mount transformer cannot operate safely with insufficient ventilation clearance creating thermal hazard"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work in the transformer area immediately",
    "Verify required clearances per NEC Art. 450 and manufacturer submittal data",
    "Reconfigure transformer location or modify surrounding construction to achieve minimum ventilation clearance",
    "Coordinate with GC and design team for any layout changes needed",
    "Request re-inspection after clearance corrections are complete before energizing"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Art. 450 mandates specific clearances for transformers to ensure adequate ventilation and safe operation. Inadequate clearance creates thermal buildup risk and violates code. Work cannot continue until clearance requirements are met and verified.",
  "references": ["NEC Art. 450", "NEC 250.30"]
}
